programmes.show_description: Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
Turn it up loud for 2 hours of proper rock from the 70s - the decade that gave birth to Prog and Metal! Including Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Black Sabbath, Alice Cooper, AC/DC and Queen.
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
They say music goes in cycles! Well for a period in the 70s we decided to celebrate all things 50s - go figure! From Racey, Mud, Darts and Showaddywaddy to the hit movie Grease.
What a decade for soul singers, and here's 60 minutes of the very best. Including Stevie Wonder, Diana Ross, Barry White and the Stylistics.
Two hours of disco babes who ruled the dancefloors! From Labelle and Lipps Inc to Tina Charles and Sister Sledge - it's all girl singers, all the way!
Pop groups ruled the 70s and came from all quarters! From Germany's Boney M, Sweden's ABBA and the UK's Queen, Police and Showaddywaddy - Tony Blackburn counts down the definitive 25.
Fifty songs from the cooler end of the 70s spectrum - designed for repeated plays! From Free to The Police via Thin Lizzy, The Clash & Lene Lovich.
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!
The biggest hits from the biggest breakout band of the late 70s, plus further smashes from 1980 & 1981 thrown in for good measure. This is The Police!
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!
The 5 years from '77 to '81 was possibly the most exciting & vibrant time to be a teenager & Clare Grogan was there - buying the records, seeing the bands & wearing the t-shirts!
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!

programmes.show_name: Roof Down, Radio UP! Road Trip 50
programmes.show_description: We're crusin' down the highway with four hours of '70s driving songs, featuring the coolest FM rock from legends like Fleetwood Mac, Eagles, Elton, ELO, Toto, and more!
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!
The biggest rock n roll rebels of the 1970s, presented by the man who was there - that groovy host from the west coast - Radio 1 legend Rosko!
Experience the magic of the 70s, where every beat was a spell and every song a timeless enchantment!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
Hit songs with few words - the 70s was full of them! From Elton John & Mike Oldfield to long-forgotten acts like Hot Butter & Focus. And yes - there are some bagpipes!

programmes.show_name: The USA's Best Sellers of the 70s!
programmes.show_description: Which singles sold more than any other is the USA during the 70s? We reveal all - you'll be surprised who's missing and by the number 1!

programmes.show_name: Born in the USA! 70 from the 70s
programmes.show_description: In order, 70 US stars with 70 famous songs. From Bob Dylan & The Supremes in 1970 to Prince & The Pointer Sisters in 1979.
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!

programmes.show_name: Bruno Brookes UK Top 40 of the 70s
programmes.show_description: Including ten big million-sellers back when it was a rare achievement! These are 40 of the biggest-selling songs of the decade with Bay City Rollers, ABBA, Queen, Blondie and Wings.
Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.
Another batch of silly songs, dodgy videos & novelty hits from the 70s. Yes every one of these was a huge hit!
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Two hours of funny videos, silly songs and novelty hits - all of them amazing and all in the best possible taste!
A super-eclectic (some would say random) mix of 50 tracks about guys, or songs containing blokes' names. We're not sure it holds together, but we gave it a go! It's in date order.
